config.name: Reserve Stress — Crisis (shock=0.030)
config.hypothesis: Under crisis conditions (shock=0.030), conservative reserve management becomes critical for survival — deployment policy must shift dramatically or civilizations collapse

findings: Optimal treasury threshold by fitness: 0.70 (mean fitness: 0.5748) at shock=0.030
Peak population stability at threshold = 0.20 (mean pop: 47.3)
Treasury ratio: 0.0009 at deployment (0.10) vs 0.0057 at hoarding (0.90)
No collapses observed across entire threshold range
Mean catastrophe deaths: 12.4 at deployment vs 12.4 at hoarding
Population volatility: 6.49 at deployment vs 6.52 at hoarding
